introSection: Raik is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Phantasialand in Brühl, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Raik was added alongside Taron, an Intamin Blitz Coaster as part of Phantasialand's new-for-2016 project, Klugheim. It is a custom Family Boomerang from Vekoma.

fullText:
Raik is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Phantasialand in Brühl, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

Raik was added alongside Taron, an Intamin Blitz Coaster as part of Phantasialand's new-for-2016 project, Klugheim. It is a custom Family Boomerang from Vekoma.
